storyboard.title: Switchlight Photoreal Split B
storyboard.prompt: @Audio1 is the final 7.1 seconds of the Switchlight hook. Use @Image1 through @Image4 as strict sequential photoreal keyframes for the second half of the music video. Follow them in order: @Image1 Nari switch cue at the stage threshold, @Image2 full hook formation, @Image3 Jia and Nari rap charge, @Image4 final group hero under the chrome arch. Include vanity mirror self-recognition as a very fast transition before @Image1 and one step-pose-shine hit between @Image2 and @Image3. Keep the same five fictional LUMINA members, fixed pearl/chrome/black wardrobe with baby-pink accents, same hairstyles, same faces, and one coherent threshold-to-stage venue. Use urgent hook rhythm, light-switch transitions, low-angle performance hits, clean orbit motion, live singing mouth movement, realistic hair and fabric motion, floor contact, natural reflections, and hold the final @Image4-inspired group hero for the last 1 second. No text, annotations, logos, watermark, products, Lumora, real celebrity likenesses, copied choreography, outfit swaps, duplicated members, anime, sketch look, plastic CGI, melted bodies, or floating feet.
